form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1800m after racing wide at Globe Derby Park was 8th-13.2 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Trigger (2:13.10) in NR 40 to 43 on April 4 at $7. Before that, a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr2) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park beaten 9 m by Balladoro (2:12.20) in NR up to 49 on March 28 at $71. Likely to measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: nconvenienced by Road Star as the field raced through the first turn.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Sr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 20 m by Perfect Playgirl (1:57.80) in NR up to 40 GROUP on March 30 at $9. Before that was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 5th-7.8 beaten 12 m by Golden Jaylet (2:13.50) in NR up to 40 on March 24 at $17. Cannot enthuse.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park was 7th-10.6 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Alimonie (2:16.00) in NR up to 39 on April 4 at $7.80. Before that, 4th (Fr6) over 1609m after racing wide at Port Pirie was 2nd-1.4 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Sportsflight (1:56.10) in NR up to 40 on March 31 at $8. Among the leading chances again.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Whata Optimist at Globe Derby Park over 1800m in a NR 43 to 48 on March 23 at $12. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Star Of Willoughby at Victor Harbor over 1660m in a NR up to 43 on April 5 at $4.20. Can play a role in the finish again.

form.formComment: Last start and went on to finish a respectable fifth over 1660m at Victor Harbor last start. At the run before was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr7) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park beaten 6 m by Golden Jaylet (2:12.90) in NR up to 43 on March 28 at $11. This looks a suitable assignment.
